texto: Making the Australian team is the hardest part, and going to the Olympics is the easy part. You're there representing your country - you're representing every single person in it, strangers you don't know - and there's a lot of positive energy, but you have to know to channel it the right way.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ken Wallace sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Making the Australian team is the hardest part, and going to the Olympics is the easy part. You'r…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a lideranca, team, easy, útil em momentos de easy e know.
